name: Deep Fried Cherries
recipeIngredient: -Fat for frying (such as vegetable or canola oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cherries and wipe them dry. Do not remove the stems.
2. Tie the cherries with thread to form clusters of 4 cherries each.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, sugar, milk, wine, and eggs. Mix until smooth batter is formed.
4. Dip each cherry cluster into the batter, coating well, then carefully drop them into a kettle of deep hot fat (375°F on a frying thermometer).
5. When the cherries are golden brown, use a slotted spoon to remove them from the fat and drain on paper towels.
6. Serve immediately with confectioner's sugar and cinnamon sprinkled on top.
SERVES: 6
